speaker: LODOVICO
text: I do beseech you, sir, trouble yourself no further.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: O, pardon me, ’twill do me good to walk.

speaker: LODOVICO
text: Madam, good night. I humbly thank your Ladyship.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Your Honor is most welcome.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Will you walk, sir?—O, Desdemona—

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: My lord?

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Get you to bed on th’ instant. I will be

speaker: OTHELLO
text: returned forthwith. Dismiss your attendant there.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Look ’t be done.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I will, my lord.

speaker: EMILIA
text: How goes it now? He looks gentler than he did.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: He says he will return incontinent,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: And hath commanded me to go to bed,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: And bade me to dismiss you.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Dismiss me?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: It was his bidding. Therefore, good Emilia,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Give me my nightly wearing, and adieu.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: We must not now displease him.

speaker: EMILIA
text: I would you had never seen him.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: So would not I. My love doth so approve him

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: That even his stubbornness, his checks, his frowns—

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Prithee, unpin me—have grace and favor in them.

speaker: EMILIA
text: I have laid those sheets you bade me on the bed.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: All’s one. Good faith, how foolish are our minds!

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: If I do die before thee, prithee, shroud me

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: In one of those same sheets.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Come, come, you talk!

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: My mother had a maid called Barbary.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: She was in love, and he she loved proved mad

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: And did forsake her. She had a song of willow,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: An old thing ’twas, but it expressed her fortune,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: And she died singing it. That song tonight

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Will not go from my mind. I have much to do

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: But to go hang my head all at one side

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: And sing it like poor Barbary. Prithee, dispatch.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Shall I go fetch your nightgown?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: No, unpin me here.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: This Lodovico is a proper man.

speaker: EMILIA
text: A very handsome man.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: He speaks well.

speaker: EMILIA
text: I know a lady in Venice would have walked

speaker: EMILIA
text: barefoot to Palestine for a touch of his nether lip.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: The poor soul sat sighing by a sycamore tree,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Sing all a green willow.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Her hand on her bosom, her head on her knee,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Sing willow, willow, willow.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: The fresh streams ran by her and murmured her moans,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Sing willow, willow, willow;

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Her salt tears fell from her, and softened the stones—

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Lay by these.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Sing willow, willow, willow.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Prithee hie thee! He’ll come anon.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Sing all a green willow must be my garland.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Let nobody blame him, his scorn I approve.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Nay, that’s not next. Hark, who is ’t that knocks?

speaker: EMILIA
text: It’s the wind.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I called my love false love, but what said he then?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Sing willow, willow, willow.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: If I court more women, you’ll couch with more men.—

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: So, get thee gone. Good night. Mine eyes do itch;

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Doth that bode weeping?

speaker: EMILIA
text: ’Tis neither here nor there.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I have heard it said so. O these men, these men!

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Dost thou in conscience think—tell me, Emilia—

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: That there be women do abuse their husbands

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: In such gross kind?

speaker: EMILIA
text: There be some such, no question.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Wouldst thou do such a deed for all the world?

speaker: EMILIA
text: Why, would not you?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: No, by this heavenly light!

speaker: EMILIA
text: Nor I neither, by this heavenly light.

speaker: EMILIA
text: I might do ’t as well i’ th’ dark.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Wouldst thou do such a deed for all the world?

speaker: EMILIA
text: The world’s a huge thing. It is a great price

speaker: EMILIA
text: for a small vice.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: In troth, I think thou wouldst not.

speaker: EMILIA
text: In troth, I think I should, and undo ’t when I

speaker: EMILIA
text: had done it. Marry, I would not do such a thing for

speaker: EMILIA
text: a joint ring, nor for measures of lawn, nor for

speaker: EMILIA
text: gowns, petticoats, nor caps, nor any petty exhibition.

speaker: EMILIA
text: But for the whole world—’Uds pity! Who

speaker: EMILIA
text: would not make her husband a cuckold to make

speaker: EMILIA
text: him a monarch? I should venture purgatory for ’t.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Beshrew me if I would do such a wrong

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: for the whole world!

speaker: EMILIA
text: Why, the wrong is but a wrong i’ th’ world;

speaker: EMILIA
text: and, having the world for your labor, ’tis a wrong in

speaker: EMILIA
text: your own world, and you might quickly make it

speaker: EMILIA
text: right.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I do not think there is any such woman.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Yes, a dozen; and as many to th’ vantage as

speaker: EMILIA
text: would store the world they played for.

speaker: EMILIA
text: But I do think it is their husbands’ faults

speaker: EMILIA
text: If wives do fall. Say that they slack their duties,

speaker: EMILIA
text: And pour our treasures into foreign laps;

speaker: EMILIA
text: Or else break out in peevish jealousies,

speaker: EMILIA
text: Throwing restraint upon us. Or say they strike us,

speaker: EMILIA
text: Or scant our former having in despite.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Why, we have galls, and though we have some grace,

speaker: EMILIA
text: Yet have we some revenge. Let husbands know

speaker: EMILIA
text: Their wives have sense like them. They see, and smell,

speaker: EMILIA
text: And have their palates both for sweet and sour,

speaker: EMILIA
text: As husbands have. What is it that they do

speaker: EMILIA
text: When they change us for others? Is it sport?

speaker: EMILIA
text: I think it is. And doth affection breed it?

speaker: EMILIA
text: I think it doth. Is ’t frailty that thus errs?

speaker: EMILIA
text: It is so too. And have not we affections,

speaker: EMILIA
text: Desires for sport, and frailty, as men have?

speaker: EMILIA
text: Then let them use us well. Else let them know,

speaker: EMILIA
text: The ills we do, their ills instruct us so.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Good night, good night. God me such uses send,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Not to pick bad from bad, but by bad mend.
